source: in-session Claude Code agent (pred-scout-coach) over data/omeda/heroes.json ability text only; every number ground-checked against the ability, failing lines dropped

wraith.E: Pop it before a fight to vanish, gain 20% speed, and reposition; chaining kills resets it so keep diving.
wraith.LMB: Poke from range between abilities to whittle enemies down and reset your basic-attack rhythm.
wraith.RMB: Snipe a low or marked target to refund mana and slash the cooldown by 75%, then fire again fast.
wraith.Q: Lead with this to slow and reveal them for 3.5s, then follow with an enhanced sniper shot for huge bonus damage.
wraith.R: Save it to yank an overextended enemy back where they were 2s ago; great for stranding a diving carry.
wraith.Passive: Drop your drone in chokes to spot enemies through walls within 1000 units before you commit.

wukong.LMB: Weave basics between abilities to keep steady melee damage flowing in extended fights.
wukong.RMB: Spirit dash to chase or escape with a slow; Body push to fling away divers and clones.
wukong.Q: Spirit lay a speed cloud for your team to chase on; Body leap to gain attack speed before diving.
wukong.E: Spirit spin for damage reduction then stun on the throw; Body slam from high ground for far more damage.
wukong.R: Switch stances for the moment, and farm hits to spawn clones; leaving combat resets your counter so stay active.
wukong.Passive: Double jump over walls to chase, dodge, or escape sticky spots.

zinx.LMB: Land basics early to stack the lingering burn, then keep attacking to refresh it over 3s.
zinx.RMB: Heal a hurt ally; wait until they are low since it heals up to 40% more on missing health.
zinx.Q: Aim through clustered enemies so the disk ricochets up to 5 times, chaining stuns across the fight.
zinx.E: Drop it where enemies must stand; the second eruption after 0.75s catches anyone slowed by the first.
zinx.R: Cast on a key ally about to die so they resurrect and keep fighting; pre-cast before the burst lands.
zinx.Passive: Keep damaging heroes to reach 5 stacks, then dash in with 75% stronger healing to clutch saves.

kallari.R: Hold it for low targets; missing-health scaling deals up to 2.5x, so finish someone you have already chunked.
kallari.LMB: Use basics to apply your mark and chip targets between dashes.
kallari.RMB: Throw to slow a fleeing enemy by 25%; keep one of your 2 charges for the chase.
kallari.Q: Pop before approaching to vanish and gain speed; remember attacking ends it, so set up first.
kallari.E: Backflip to safety then dash back in for 2x damage if they still carry your Death Mark.
kallari.Passive: Land any damage to mark them, then detonate it; extra jumps let you reach escaping targets.

grim-exe.LMB: Keep firing to stack Sentry buffs or cleave in Assault; basics are your core damage.
grim-exe.RMB: Time the 1.5s shield to eat their key spell, refunding missing mana when it lands.
grim-exe.Q: Fire it to poke; in Assault Mode use the lobbed version to displace enemies out of position.
grim-exe.E: Stay in Sentry to farm mana and stacks; flip to Assault for huge range and cleave in fights.
grim-exe.R: Lock onto a fleeing low hero from across the map, but warn allies the orb can be body-blocked.
grim-exe.Passive: Apply Pulsefire with any hit, then burst it with the next attack for free true damage.

the-fey.LMB: Poke from range to soften enemies before committing your spells.
the-fey.RMB: Throw it onto a target you can pin; half the damage lands when it explodes after 2s, so trap them in it.
the-fey.Q: Drop on chokes to slow enemies and speed your team; it lasts 5s, so block paths during fights.
the-fey.E: Spam this short-cooldown poke; hitting a hero refunds 75% mana, and repeat hits ramp up damage.
the-fey.R: Pull a clustered enemy group inward, stunning for 1s; combo with bramble and your spells to delete them.
the-fey.Passive: Chase takedowns in fights to spawn free plants and gain 30% speed to clean up.

lt-belica.Q: Land this skillshot to knock up and stun for 1s, opening your full combo on a pinned target.
lt-belica.LMB: Use the three-round bursts to last-hit and poke between your spells.
lt-belica.RMB: Place it where they must walk; each enemy hit restores mana to keep you casting.
lt-belica.E: Deploy near enemies to drain their mana and zap them when they cast, denying their key spells.
lt-belica.R: Execute targets low on mana since damage scales with their missing mana; great as a finisher.
lt-belica.Passive: Max your most-used ability first for the bonus strength and ability haste.

khaimera.LMB: Hit constantly to build Rage and trigger on-hit effects; basics fuel your whole kit.
khaimera.RMB: Leap onto low targets for up to 2x damage and a strong slow, then stick to them.
khaimera.Q: Activate before a fight for max attack speed and cleave; pair with lifesteal items to heal through trades.
khaimera.E: Hold it to cleanse crowd control and heal at the right moment, not the instant you take damage.
khaimera.R: Channel into a clumped enemy group for a 1.25s stun and heavy damage; flank so they cannot escape.
khaimera.Passive: Keep attacking to hold high Rage for faster cooldowns and 8% speed above 50 Rage.

gideon.RMB: Fire through enemies to slow them; it explodes on terrain or a hero, so angle it into walls.
gideon.Q: Drop the meteor where they will be; combo after your slow to guarantee the hit.
gideon.E: Blink through to reposition or chase, and let allies follow through the portal during its 5s.
gideon.R: Channel your black hole on a clumped team; you cannot cancel it after 2.75s, so commit when they are pinned.
gideon.Passive: Land an ability then basic attack to tether them; the root after 2.1s sets up your combo.
gideon.LMB: Use basics to proc your tether after landing an ability on an enemy hero.

drongo.LMB: Weave basics to apply effects and keep pressure between throws.
drongo.RMB: Aim it to clip enemies twice, on throw and return; bounce it off terrain to slow them coming and going.
drongo.Q: Toss into a group to silence them and deny escapes or channels for over a second.
drongo.E: Turn on the attack speed, then pop irradiated enemies early with your boomerang or ultimate for burst.
drongo.R: Blast a clumped team to shred 30% armor for 4s; cast in-air to launch yourself away while pushing them back.
drongo.Passive: Land crits and abilities to bleed enemies for 2.25% max health; stack with your other damage to melt tanks.

iggy-scorch.RMB: Throw it onto enemies, then keep the fire field on a chokepoint to deal damage over 2.5s.
iggy-scorch.Q: Place up to 3 turrets in lane or fights; aim Spew at a hero so they all focus it.
iggy-scorch.E: Roll oil through enemies to slow them, then ignite it with a fire ability for big bonus damage.
iggy-scorch.R: Charge through a teamfight for speed and heavy damage, then reactivate the belch to knock back attackers.
iggy-scorch.Passive: Stack Slick with basics, then ignite with fire for escalating burn; more stacks means more damage.
iggy-scorch.LMB: Poke with basics and use Spew to redirect your turrets onto a priority target.

steel.LMB: Alternate light and heavy swings; heavies hit much harder, so land them on isolated targets.
steel.RMB: Swipe to stun and chunk tanks; it deals extra based on their max health, so use it on beefy enemies.
steel.Q: Charge through enemies while unstoppable to knock heroes back and stun minions and monsters for 2s.
steel.E: Drop the wall to block projectiles for 4s and damage plus slow the first hero who walks through.
steel.R: Leap onto a clumped group for heavy damage and a 1.5s knock-up stun; combo to lock down the fight.
steel.Passive: Stay out of damage so your max-health shield refreshes before you re-engage.

legion.LMB: Stop firing briefly to reload; manage your magazine so you are full when a fight starts.
legion.RMB: Cook the grenade to control the throw; release early near enemies so it auto-explodes for the launch.
legion.Q: Fire at a clustered group so the 10 mines scatter onto them, slowing for 1s; first hits hurt most.
legion.E: Plant the standard before fights for ally speed and healing; stay within 1500 units to keep the buff.
legion.R: Mark a contested zone; the beam tracks heroes and lasts up to 9s, denying them the area.
legion.Passive: Build attack speed and items to unlock the stat thresholds that upgrade your abilities.

boris.Q: Sniff to mark and chase a target with up to 85% speed along the trail; hit them to slow and gain a canister.
boris.LMB: Attack steadily to build canisters every second hit toward your healing core.
boris.RMB: Dash through enemies to deal two hits and apply on-hit effects; use it to engage or stick to a target.
boris.E: Pop the barrier for 2.5s damage reduction, then detonate to fear nearby enemies and set up your grab.
boris.R: Dash and grab the first enemy hero, slamming them for heavy damage and a 75% slow; aim at their key target.
boris.Passive: Keep hitting to reach 4 canisters and unleash the core, which zaps enemies and heals you in fights.

phase.LMB: Poke with basics; you are at your best supporting your linked ally, not trading alone.
phase.RMB: Link your strongest ally for shared power, then reactivate to pull them out of danger before the link breaks.
phase.Q: Blast around you and your linked ally to blind enemies facing it; hitting a hero drops your blink to 1s.
phase.E: Channel the beam on one target to slow and, at 8 stacks, root them for over a second to set up kills.
phase.R: Pop on you and your linked ally before a fight for big attack speed, haste, and 135% speed.
phase.Passive: Cast abilities to heal yourself and your linked ally; blink before fights for 15% more damage.

murdock.LMB: Land 5 basics to empower the next shot with extra range and bonus damage; use it to poke safely.
murdock.RMB: Blast point-blank for max damage and knockback; it shreds 15% armor for 4s to soften their frontline.
murdock.Q: Pre-place traps in bushes and chokes; they root for 1.25s, so guard escape routes and objectives.
murdock.E: Turn on sirens to kite, stacking attack speed up to 5 times; it resets on takedown for chaining fights.
murdock.R: Snipe across the map through walls, ignoring armor, to finish a fleeing low hero; line up the whole path.
murdock.Passive: Count your basics; the empowered fifth shot reaches further, so use it to harass from safety.

terra.LMB: Hit enemies to build Hersir stacks toward an empowered ability; basics also drive your sustain.
terra.RMB: Channel toward a target to close distance while unstoppable; hold up to 1.25s for far more damage and a shield.
terra.Q: Spin into clustered enemies; each hero hit refunds 10% cooldown, so it comes back fast in fights.
terra.E: Throw to slow and shred 20% armor for 4.5s; with 5 stacks it roots instead, locking a target down.
terra.R: Pop near towers to disable them and gain armor and tenacity; dive safely with the cleanse and slow.
terra.Passive: Reach 5 stacks before using a basic ability to trigger its empowered effect; recall refills stacks instantly.

skylar.RMB: Activate to attack at a fixed fast rate that ramps over time; refresh it on takedowns to keep shredding.
skylar.Q: Stick the bubble on a target, then the delayed burst slows nearby enemies; combo into your ultimate.
skylar.E: Thrust up to hover and gain extra range, firing bonus missiles while you attack from above safely.
skylar.R: Channel then fire at a key hero; it stops on the first one and deals more the lower their health.
skylar.LMB: Use basics to apply on-hit effects; they get bonus damage and feed Hypercharge.
skylar.Passive: Last-hit units to make them explode; killing heroes makes a far bigger blast to chunk their team.

kira.RMB: Fire Mercy to apply 3 Vengeance stacks and big burst; it crits and lifesteals, so weave it constantly.
kira.LMB: Use Wrath to keep applying Vengeance and sustain damage between Mercy shots.
kira.Q: Hold until enemies carry many Vengeance stacks, then purify for bonus per-stack damage and a slow; it resets on a kill.
kira.E: Dash to dodge or reposition, stacking up to 25 bonus power; save it to escape since it resets on takedown.
kira.R: Channel near a clumped team for heavy damage and 45% healing cut; you can still dash, so stay safe while channeling.
kira.Passive: Time your empowered Nevermore attack onto a high-health target for current-health bonus damage.

maco.LMB: Hit enemies to stack up to 4; at max your next ability's cooldown drops by 1s, so basic before casting.
maco.RMB: Throw across distance and let it travel far for a longer stun, or detonate early to catch a dodger.
maco.Q: Aim at hurt allies to heal and speed them, or at enemies for damage; pick the target you need most.
maco.E: Leap onto an enemy hero for damage, a slow, and a shield; use the landing dash to reposition.
maco.R: Charge to extend range, then fire to push and stun enemies along it; the end explosion stuns up to 1.4s.
maco.Passive: Keep moving to build speed stacks; at 25 you get slow immunity to dodge crowd control.

revenant.LMB: Track your ammo; the fourth round always crits, so save it for a key target before reloading.
revenant.RMB: Reload to line up the empowered final shot, which hits harder on low targets and frees you to chase.
revenant.Q: Fire the missile swarm into a fight; mark a target with Scar first so they all home onto it.
revenant.E: Hit with the orb to apply 4 marks, then keep damaging to consume them and root for 1s.
revenant.R: Pull a key carry into the realm to 1v1 them, stealing their power; killing there doubles bounty gold.
revenant.Passive: Build crit and attack speed to grow your power; secure kills to snowball your bonus gold.

yin.RMB: Crack the whip to push divers off and reflect their projectiles back; time it against ranged attackers.
yin.Q: Whip to a target or wall to pull yourself in, slowing them 90%, then leap whichever way is safe.
yin.E: Land every third basic for max-health bonus damage and healing; activate to extend range and cleave.
yin.R: Drop the gale during fights to slow enemies, speed yourself, and halt their projectiles while you duel.
yin.LMB: Hit heroes to stack Rising Storm attack speed; basics are your main damage, so keep swinging.
yin.Passive: Keep attacking heroes to hold high Rising Storm stacks for big attack speed.

argus.LMB: Poke with basics between casts to keep chip damage going.
argus.RMB: Hold the beam on a target for sustained damage, but watch your mana since each blast drains it.
argus.Q: Lead the orb so it stuns a target for over a second, then unload your full combo while they are held.
argus.E: Drop the crystal under a clump to push enemies and lift allies; it implodes to pull them back together.
argus.R: Channel on a clumped, low team; beams deal far more on missing health, so fire after softening them up.
argus.Passive: Chain abilities quickly to stack Disintegration, since each stack adds 50% more bonus damage.

mourn.LMB: Use basics to apply your Extract bonus damage and sustain between spells.
mourn.RMB: Channel to extend range, then unleash to pull the first enemy in and slow them 90%; set up your team.
mourn.Q: Cast in a fight to heal and armor allies while poisoning and shredding enemy armor; great in clumps.
mourn.E: Channel to expand the zone for damage reduction, then mesmerize enemies; hold longer for a longer lock.
mourn.R: Pop in a teamfight to blind enemy vision and apply Contagion worldwide while you gain speed to roam.
mourn.Passive: Land your empowered next basic to hit everyone nearby and heal off the damage.

grux.LMB: Stack Bloodlust bleeds on enemies before committing to fights for consistent damage scaling.
grux.RMB: Cleave for heavy damage and big healing off heroes and camp leaders; use it to win trades and sustain.
grux.Q: Charge it to extend range, then pull a group toward you and stun for 0.75s to start a fight.
grux.E: Charge through enemies to drag heroes along with you; use it to pull a target into your team.
grux.R: Slam into a clump to stun and gain attack speed; steal power on-hit and extend it on bleeding targets.
grux.Passive: Keep attacking to build bleed stacks, which melt tanks over 5s.

bayle.LMB: Chain your basic swings; the third hits hardest, so finish the chain on a target.
bayle.RMB: Leap and slam to mark enemies, shredding armor and granting you 30% speed toward them; cancel early to slam beneath you.
bayle.Q: Land all 3 slashes on one target for the bonus bleed; the third slash knocks up and stuns for 0.65s.
bayle.E: Howl in melee to slow enemies and buff yourself with power and omnivamp; you heal when the buff ends.
bayle.R: Dash into a key hero to lock them in a long combo for heavy max-health damage; aim it as a finisher.
bayle.Passive: Below 40% health you go Berserk for speed and attack speed; fight on to leverage it, once per 20s.

morigesh.LMB: Use daggers to refresh Pestilence on already-afflicted enemies, keeping the poison ticking.
morigesh.RMB: Mark a hero to start your combo and heal; killing a unit with it refunds cooldown and mana to spam it.
morigesh.Q: Throw into a clump for damage and a 50% slow that decays over 3s, setting up your other spells.
morigesh.E: Become the swarm to dash through enemies for damage and healing; hitting a hero fully refreshes it.
morigesh.R: Channel to nuke your marked target for big damage; land Mark first since this consumes it.
morigesh.Passive: Stack Pestilence up to 4 with abilities for max-health poison; refresh it with daggers to keep it up.

muriel.LMB: Poke with basics to chip enemies while your cooldowns refresh.
muriel.RMB: Charge for 1.1s to reach the stun version; full charge slows or stuns, so hold it to lock a target.
muriel.Q: Drop the zone on a fight to buff ally attack speed and healing while damaging and slowing enemies inside.
muriel.E: Shield an ally and speed them to save them from a dive; it lingers 8s if no one grabs it.
muriel.R: Fly to a diving or dying ally anywhere for damage reduction and a big shield, knocking up enemies on arrival.
muriel.Passive: Hit enemies with abilities to cut their healing and boost your allies' healing received.

greystone.LMB: Use basics to chip enemies and trigger your empowered Sacred Oath swing.
greystone.RMB: Leap onto an enemy hero to cut its cooldown 35% and gain speed, letting you re-engage quickly.
greystone.Q: Drop the whirlwind on a clump to shred armor over 4s, stacking up to 4 times to soften their frontline.
greystone.E: Charge it, then land the empowered cleaving basic to slow and hit everyone nearby for 1.25s.
greystone.R: Pop when low to enter stasis, healing more the lower you are, then crash down on the clump for huge damage.
greystone.Passive: Fight at low health; your deflect, regen, and armor all scale up with missing health.

rampage.LMB: Use basics to cancel Pounce early and to apply pressure in melee.
rampage.RMB: Leap in to launch enemies; combo with a held boulder so it shatters on landing for area effects.
rampage.Q: Hold the boulder and throw to stun a key target for over a second; it shatters on the first hero hit.
rampage.E: Pound the ground in a clump for damage and a slow; spam it since it has a short cooldown.
rampage.R: Activate before a fight for max health and self-healing; stay near enemies to boost the heal further.
rampage.Passive: Jungle to double your regen, and bait crowd control to gain tenacity and heal back up.

riktor.Q: Swing to break shields then silence for 0.8s; lead with it to lock down a caster.
riktor.LMB: Use basics for steady melee damage between your hooks and combos.
riktor.RMB: Hook the first enemy to pull them into your team; aim carefully since it stops on the first target.
riktor.E: Turn on the aura before diving for a shield, speed, and area damage; trade so the pulse triggers off damage taken.
riktor.R: Suppress a clumped group for 1.3s, then rip the chains for a second hit; use it to start a teamfight.
riktor.Passive: Land your immobilizes and silences to freeze enemy cooldowns, denying their escape or counter.

sevarog.LMB: Use basics for steady melee damage while your spells are down.
sevarog.RMB: Dash through enemies to fear them for 1s; use it to disrupt a fight or escape.
sevarog.Q: Spam this short-cooldown strike to farm and stack max-health steal off heroes; it grows you over time.
sevarog.E: Chain enemies to the center for 2s; if they leave the zone they take damage and a 1.25s stun.
sevarog.R: Knock a clumped group back with the heavy blow; at max rank it executes minions for fast clears.
sevarog.Passive: Last-hit with Siphon to bank Souls; hitting 40/80/120/160 unlocks big health and new bonuses.

shinbi.RMB: Dash through enemies for damage and mobility; keep one of your 2 charges to escape.
shinbi.Q: Send the wolf in a line through enemies to poke or finish; spam it thanks to its low cooldown.
shinbi.E: Cast for a shield and speed, then stay near enemies so the circling wolves keep hitting them.
shinbi.R: Build 8 Track stacks by hitting marked heroes, then unleash wolves onto every marked enemy at once.
shinbi.Passive: Time your empowered basic for big bonus damage, a Track stack, and mana back.
shinbi.LMB: Use basics to apply Marks and feed your passive empowered hit.

kwang.RMB: Hold the blade for a shield and magical damage; throw it out and recast for stronger true damage.
kwang.Q: Throw the blade to tether an enemy for 1.3s, then combo while they are stuck; recall breaks it early.
kwang.E: Dash through enemies for damage; near the thrown blade it crashes back to you, knocking enemies up.
kwang.R: Strike for heavy damage and a slow; with the blade out you teleport to it first to catch a fleeing target.
kwang.Passive: Land abilities to energize your blade, then weave basics to reduce your cooldowns and chain combos.
kwang.LMB: Use basics to stack Energized for attack speed and a lightning strike that lowers your cooldowns.

twinblast.LMB: Fire the twin shots to apply on-hit effects and trigger your empowered ability-cast attack.
twinblast.RMB: Toss a grenade to slow enemies; keep one of your 2 charges to peel or chase.
twinblast.Q: Fire the piercing shot through a line of enemies for big damage and on-hit effects on all of them.
twinblast.E: Dash to dodge or reposition; damaging heroes refunds its cooldown faster, so trade to keep it up.
twinblast.R: Unload the machine guns on a stationary target during your combo; it can crit, so use it as a finisher.
twinblast.Passive: Cast an ability then immediately basic attack for a triple-shot of bonus attack speed and damage.

aurora.LMB: Use basics for bonus on-hit magical damage between your spells.
aurora.RMB: Sweep the cone to slow, then the delayed eruption adds more damage; combo it to set up a root or stun.
aurora.Q: Dash to leave an ice wall your team can walk on for big speed; reactivate to drop it early.
aurora.E: Drop the ring around you so enemies who touch it are rooted for over a second; combo into your burst.
aurora.R: Cast on a key target to slow, stun, then explode for heavy area damage; line up your team to follow.
aurora.Passive: Jump mid-air to leave a replica that tanks tower aggro; immobilizing heroes lowers its cooldown.

dekker.E: Drop the fence to wall off a target or block enemy escape and chase routes for up to 3.2s.
dekker.LMB: Poke with basics while you wait to land your crowd-control combo.
dekker.RMB: Bounce the bomb so it travels far for a longer stun, up to 1.6s; lead your throw to catch them.
dekker.Q: Fire the beam through enemies to slow and chunk them; aim it where they must move.
dekker.R: Drop it on a clumped or pinned team; enemies in the center get stunned, the rest slowed for 1.5s.
dekker.Passive: Cast abilities to refresh your boots faster, jumping to speed nearby allies during chases.

akeron.LMB: Use basics to build Hunger and apply on-hit effects between casts.
akeron.RMB: Hit enemies up close for 1.35x damage and healing; secure a kill to become Awakened and shred armor.
akeron.Q: Launch the Eye and pause it over enemies so its fireballs slow and chip them; refire to reposition it.
akeron.E: Web a hero to root them for 1s, or web terrain to swing in and slam down for a knock-up stun.
akeron.R: Pull a low enemy into your bite to execute them under their health threshold and grow permanently stronger.
akeron.Passive: Keep hitting enemies to reach max Hunger and Awaken for damage reduction and stronger abilities.

renna.LMB: Poke with basics while you collect Essence to power up your spells.
renna.RMB: Fire the waves through enemies; more Essence adds projectiles, so cast it after farming souls.
renna.Q: Drop the orb on a target to pull and damage them over 4s while healing you; it executes low enemies.
renna.E: Launch the orb to mesmerize a target for over a second; recast early or wait the 1.5s to time it.
renna.R: Teleport into a fight and summon the singularity to rain damage; collect Essence first to make it last longer.
renna.Passive: Hover by jumping mid-air, and move over Essence drops, especially from heroes, to enhance your kit.

gadget.RMB: Send the droid over a target and stop it so it chases and damages them over 2.5s; great zone control.
gadget.Q: Stick the mine on an enemy, then basic-attack them to empower it for much bigger damage on detonation.
gadget.E: Throw the gate to speed allies through, or to damage and root an enemy who passes for 1s.
gadget.R: Drop the dome on a clumped team for heavy damage over 5s; it grows 60% larger, so trap them inside.
gadget.Passive: Hit heroes with abilities and secure takedowns to bank stacks for permanent magical power.
gadget.LMB: Poke with basics while your cooldowns refresh.

adele.LMB: Use basics for steady physical plus true damage between your spells.
adele.RMB: Unfurl the sword to root a hero for 0.6s and dash to the furthest target; use it to engage or close gaps.
adele.Q: Swing in for a mesmerize and slow-immune setup, then slam for true damage; great to lock down a target.
adele.E: Equip the shield for damage reduction and to leash enemies within 800u; cast it during other abilities.
adele.R: Leap into a clump to root and slow them in the thornbush for 8s; punish enemies for moving inside it.
adele.Passive: Damage heroes to apply Thorns so allies add bonus true damage; focus the same targets together.

zarus.LMB: Use basics to build Gladiator stacks and apply steady damage.
zarus.RMB: Throw the spear at low enemies for 100% more damage below 20% health; tap quickly to thrust and refund cooldown.
zarus.Q: Raise the shield to block 75% of damage, then swing for a charged-up hit and a 0.75s stun.
zarus.E: Dash to chase or escape, gaining attack speed for 3.5s; use the in-air version to reposition vertically.
zarus.R: Leap onto a key hero for big damage and a doubled Gladiator buff; kill them to gain permanent power.
zarus.Passive: Keep hitting non-minions to stack power up to 8; out of combat the stacks heal you as they fall off.

crunch.RMB: Dash in to deal damage and a brief stun; empowered, it goes further and pushes heroes for a bigger engage.
crunch.Q: Swing to hit the first enemy hardest; empowered, it becomes true damage to everyone, so save it for clumps.
crunch.E: Jab for damage and a 50% slow; empowered, it knocks enemies up to set up your combo.
crunch.R: Repeat your last ability for a second big hit; the passive heals you every third hit, so stay aggressive.
crunch.Passive: Cast abilities to build Turbo; at 2 stacks your next ability is enhanced, so plan which one to empower.
crunch.LMB: Weave basics after abilities to trigger your bonus magical damage and lower cooldowns.

serath.LMB: Use basics for physical plus magical on-hit damage between your fast combos.
serath.RMB: Clap to slow enemies 40% and apply on-hit effects; it resets your basic cooldown, so weave attacks around it.
serath.Q: Mark a target and strike them 5 times; use it to commit onto a key hero since you teleport to them.
serath.E: Rise up and aim where they will be, then dive for damage; use it to engage or escape after 1.8s.
serath.R: Pop in a fight for speed, attack speed, and burning basics over 2s; chase takedowns to recast it free.
serath.Passive: After a takedown, grab the visage to refresh Heresy free and slash your cooldowns by 65%.

sparrow.Q: Rain arrows on a clumped or pinned group to slow and chunk them over 2.5s.
sparrow.E: Vanish to escape or reposition, then gain attack speed for 6s; weave attacks to apply extra Relentless.
sparrow.R: Unleash the fan of arrows on a clumped team for sustained crits and on-hit damage; stand safe while firing.
sparrow.LMB: Hit enemies to build Relentless; basics against stacked targets deal bonus max-health damage.
sparrow.RMB: Charge to full power for max damage through a line; it hits Relentless targets even harder, so stack first.
sparrow.Passive: Keep attacking to stack Relentless up to 8, ramping your basic-attack max-health damage on tanks.

yurei.RMB: Fire the three projectiles to apply Soul Rip for 4s, marking targets for your Severance combo.
yurei.Q: Spin to damage and Soul Rip nearby enemies, and heal off heroes or monsters; cast in-air to leap up.
yurei.E: Rush into a Soul-Ripped target to reset Severance and tear out their soul, which shares damage with them.
yurei.R: Channel in a clump to apply Soul Rip, then pull and strike them down for heavy damage and a reset.
yurei.Passive: Cast an ability to gain ranged attack speed; your next two basics bounce and add bonus damage.
yurei.LMB: Use basics for steady melee damage and to set up your ranged passive attacks.

feng-mao.LMB: Use basics for steady melee damage while your cooldowns refresh.
feng-mao.RMB: Dash through enemies for current-health damage; a takedown cuts its cooldown 80% so you can chain dives.
feng-mao.Q: Pop the spellshield to block a key enemy ability; blocking one doubles your passive power and speed gain.
feng-mao.E: Swing twice to slow enemies; hitting only one target adds bonus damage, so isolate a single hero.
feng-mao.R: Slam on a low clumped group to execute anyone under the threshold; recast free within 20s after a hero execute.
feng-mao.Passive: Chase unique hero takedowns for permanent penetration that makes your damage cut through armor.

narbash.E: Toggle Speed to roam and chase, or Healing to sustain your team between fights; switch as needed.
narbash.LMB: Use basics for melee damage when enemies get close.
narbash.RMB: Toss the drumstick to stun a key target for over a second; aim it to start a fight or peel a diver.
narbash.Q: Bellow before engaging for a big team speed or healing boost over 4s; use Speed to catch fleeing enemies.
narbash.R: Channel in a clumped team to stack slows into a mesmerize, then knock up and stun with the final hit.
narbash.Passive: Fight near other heroes to gain stacking power and armor; stay grouped to maximize the bonus.

eden.LMB: Ranged fires fast for poke; Melee chains light hits into a heavy, so close the chain on a target.
eden.RMB: Ranged thrust and fire an exploding railshot; Melee dash and uppercut to slow and stick to a target.
eden.Q: Ranged fire the piercing laser through a line; Melee spin then strike forward for damage and a 50% slow.
eden.E: Switch stances to swap your whole kit; ranged gains power, melee heals off hero damage, so pick per fight.
eden.R: Build Heat to 300 to unlock it; ranged rains four beams from above, melee teleports in to strike then slam.
eden.Passive: Deal hero damage to build Heat for your Limit Break; max your ultimate to generate it faster.

neon.LMB: Poke with basics while your abilities are on cooldown.
neon.RMB: Dash to reposition and empower your next Jolt to explode and slow; overclocked, recast it free within 3s.
neon.Q: Send the construct through enemies for magical then true damage on its return; overclocked, it pulses for more.
neon.E: Lob it onto a target to detonate for damage and a slow; overclocked, it mesmerizes them too.
neon.R: Overclock for 8s of speed and empowered abilities, then recast to bomb a low target for missing-health damage.
neon.Passive: Cast three basic abilities to reach 3 Threads, making your next ability overclocked for a big effect.

countess.Passive: Land two ability hits within 4s to apply the true-damage bleed and gain 5% speed to chase.
countess.LMB: Use basics to finish targets between your spell rotations.
countess.RMB: Spin in a clump to heal hugely off heroes (450% more) and shred them while sustaining.
countess.Q: Dash in to engage, then re-trigger within 3.5s to swap back to your shadow and escape.
countess.E: Fire the darkness cloud through a lane of enemies to poke or finish a combo from range.
countess.R: Leap onto a key hero to suppress them; if they already bleed, it deals 50% more and fully heals you.

howitzer.Passive: Cast abilities to lower this cooldown, then land the empowered basic; it refunds full mana against heroes.
howitzer.LMB: Use basics to last-hit and trigger your empowered salvo attack.
howitzer.RMB: Lay the proximity bombs on chokes and escape paths so enemies trigger them and get slowed.
howitzer.Q: Hover and charge longer for up to full damage; aim where the enemy is forced to stand.
howitzer.E: Lob the mine behind a target to knock them back into your team and stun for 0.5s; detonate early if needed.
howitzer.R: Rise up and paint a clumped team to rain missiles over 4s; reposition the target as they scatter.
